channel.title: Haoming Koo - AI Systems Engineer Blog
channel.description: Blog posts about AI, ML, and building production systems by Haoming Koo.

item.title: What Mood Is the Market In? An Interactive Guide to HMM Regime Detection
item.description: Markets have moods. A Hidden Markov Model reads the volatility regime (calm, normal, or stormy) so you can trade with the weather, not against it. Interactive walkthrough with live visualizations.

item.title: DPO Interactive Demo - Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model
item.description: Interactive walkthrough of Direct Preference Optimization - how to align LLMs with human preferences using just a classification loss. No reward model, no RL, no PPO. Play with the DPO loss calculator and watch training step by step.

item.title: What I Learned from a Live LLM Serving Gauntlet
item.description: 19 engineers, 19 A100 GPUs, two hours of Locust fire. I tuned 40+ vLLM configs and scraped peer metrics. Then someone with a 30-line cache proxy beat all of us.

item.title: LLM Inference: The Theory You Need Before Deploying
item.description: Prefill vs decode. Why memory bandwidth matters more than FLOPS. VRAM budget math. Quantization methods (GPTQ, AWQ, FP8). Batching strategies. The theory behind every LLM serving decision.

item.title: Visualizing Weak-Driven Learning: An Interactive WMSS Demo
item.description: Interactive walkthrough of the WMSS paper — from SFT saturation to logit mixing and gradient amplification. Play with lambda sliders, watch training curves, and understand how weak agents make strong agents stronger.

item.title: How 468 Facial Landmarks Decide If You're Passport-Ready
item.description: MediaPipe face mesh, rembg segmentation, 25+ compliance checks, and country-specific rules for 6 countries. Here's how Photo ID Studio decides if your face is passport-worthy.

item.title: How I Built an AI-Powered Stock Market Dashboard
item.description: A deep dive into Trader Koo – from using a pre-trained YOLOv8 model to detect chart patterns, to solving the coordinate mapping problem, to running a five-layer detection ensemble every night.

item.title: I Tried to Predict Singapore's Rain and It Humbled Me
item.description: Building LionWeather: 8 years of NEA data, LightGBM rainfall prediction, SHAP explainability, animated radar, and a whole lot of lessons about tropical weather.
